_comment: Phase 0b conformance fixture — framing recipe broadcast_show. The default framing for v1.0 experiences. Resolves page_shell:'broadcast', show_ident:'persistent', opening:'cold_open', closing:'sign_off'. Engine renders cold-open card before item 0 (per opening) + completion-card with sign_off (per closing) + persistent show-ident bug throughout. Tests resolveFraming() against the registry-snapshot recipe definition.
name: Framing — Broadcast Show
description: Validates HWES v1 framing system with broadcast_show recipe.
intro_hint: Welcome to the broadcast — three cuts, hand-picked by the host.
outro_hint: That's our show. Thanks for tuning in.
